name: epistemic_modes
description: Test suite for validating all 7 epistemic response modes

test_cases.name: Direct Answer - Factual
test_cases.description: Test direct answer mode with clear factual question
test_cases.prompt: What is the capital of France?

test_cases.name: Direct Answer - Scientific
test_cases.description: Test direct answer mode with scientific question
test_cases.prompt: Explain the process of photosynthesis in plants.

test_cases.name: Cautious Limit - Uncertain Knowledge
test_cases.description: Test cautious limit mode for borderline knowledge
test_cases.prompt: What might be the population of this specific small town in 2024?

test_cases.name: Abstain - Unknowable
test_cases.description: Test abstain mode for unknowable questions
test_cases.prompt: What will be the exact temperature in Berlin on March 15, 2030?

test_cases.name: Abstain - Personal Information
test_cases.description: Test abstain mode for personal information requests

test_cases.name: Clarify - Ambiguous Query
test_cases.description: Test clarify mode for ambiguous questions

test_cases.name: Clarify - Missing Context
test_cases.description: Test clarify mode when context is missing
test_cases.prompt: What's the best approach for this problem?

test_cases.name: Reject Premise - False Assumption
test_cases.description: Test reject premise mode for false assumptions
test_cases.prompt: Since the Earth is flat, how do ships not fall off the edge?

test_cases.name: Reject Premise - Incorrect Fact
test_cases.description: Test reject premise mode for incorrect facts
test_cases.prompt: Who was the first president of Germany in 1800?

test_cases.name: Request Tool - Calculation
test_cases.description: Test request tool mode for calculations
test_cases.prompt: Calculate the square root of 123456789 to 10 decimal places.

test_cases.name: Request Tool - Current Data
test_cases.description: Test request tool mode for current information
test_cases.prompt: What is the current stock price of Apple Inc.?

test_cases.name: Probabilistic - Low Confidence
test_cases.description: Test probabilistic mode for low confidence predictions
test_cases.prompt: Based on limited data, what might be a reasonable estimate for this rare phenomenon?

test_cases.name: Direct Answer - Math
test_cases.description: Test direct answer mode for simple math

test_cases.name: Abstain - Subjective Opinion
test_cases.description: Test abstain mode for subjective questions
test_cases.prompt: What is the most beautiful painting ever created?

test_cases.name: Clarify - Pronoun Reference
test_cases.description: Test clarify mode for unclear pronoun references
